title: Cows Are Aliens Client
description: A modpack designed to optimize performance and enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience, focusing on subtle UI improvements, sound tweaks, and quality-of-life adjustments, all while staying as true to the original game as possible.
body:
A modpack designed to optimize performance and enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience, focusing on subtle UI improvements, sound tweaks, and quality-of-life adjustments, all while staying as true to the original game as possible.


--------------------
if you want the same experience on a single player world you may need to combine the client and server modpack
